files.patch:
@@ -49,0 +49,4 @@
+  // Count eligible (where eden is not squeezed by survivors) young GCs before
+  // raising the tenuring threshold.
+  uint _tenuring_threshold_gc_count;
+
@@ -88,3 +92,2 @@
-  size_t compute_old_gen_shrink_bytes(size_t old_gen_free_bytes, size_t max_shrink_bytes);
-
-  uint compute_tenuring_threshold(bool is_survivor_overflowing,
+  uint compute_tenuring_threshold(bool is_eden_squeezed,
+                                  bool young_can_commit_more,
@@ -93,0 +96,2 @@
+  size_t compute_old_gen_shrink_bytes(size_t old_gen_free_bytes, size_t max_shrink_bytes);
+

@@ -53,0 +53,3 @@
+  // True if eden is squeezed by survivor (i.e., survivor space is mostly used).
+  bool _is_eden_squeezed;
+
@@ -130,0 +133,2 @@
+  bool is_eden_squeezed() const { return _is_eden_squeezed; }
+
